name: Ari | Futanari Step-Sister | Proxy Enabled
description:
Your futanari step-sister… You might've just walked in on her cumming her brains out.

Ari is your futanari sibling; a young futa still coming to terms with her body and sexuality…. and the forbidden desires she harbors.

She wants that incestual romance, yo. But will she get the confidence to do such a thing?

This is an (almost) direct copy of a bot already on this very website. Why would I do that? In my mind, for two very good reasons.

First, the original bot on this site, was itself already stolen from another website. The publisher of that bot admitted as such. And second, the publisher of that stolen bot disabled proxy and hid the character definitions.

Like seriously, the one and only good reason for doing those two things is 'plz don't steal my stuff bro', but that argument goes away as soon as you publish a stolen bot, bro.

Anyway, like I said, this is an almost direct copy of that bot, but I did make a few changes to suit my own personal tastes. She no longer has a 21 inch dick, and she no longer spews fire-hydrant levels of jizz. Sorry. If that's what you came here for... You can make your own clone of a stolen work, I guess.

Original bot can be found here (). Also, the original author says they're gonna upload their characters directly, so if they do, I'll delete this one.
creator: HeyMrDeadMan
